scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you?

choices.text: I'm looking for work. Are you hiring?
Do you have any job openings?
Give me a job now.
I don't really want to work.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here about the job posting?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to submit my resume.
I brought my CV. Who should I give it to?
Just hire me without looking.
I didn't bring anything.

scenes.npcDialog: Thanks for coming in. Tell me about yourself.

choices.text: I'm from Korea and I'm on a working holiday visa.
I have experience in customer service.
I don't like talking about myself.
What do you want to know?

scenes.npcDialog: What hours are you available to work?

choices.text: I'm flexible. I can work weekends too.
I prefer mornings, but I can adjust.
I only work 2 hours a day.
Whenever I feel like it.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any questions about the position?

choices.text: What's the hourly wage?
How often is payday?
I want double the pay.
Money doesn't matter.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here to register for tax?

choices.text: Yes, I just started working. What do I need?
How do I get a tax file number?
I don't want to pay taxes.
Taxes are unfair.

scenes.npcDialog: What type of account would you like to open?

choices.text: A basic checking account for my salary.
I need an account to receive my wages.
The one with free money.
Just put cash in my hand.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a long-term rental?

choices.text: Yes, I'll be here for about a year.
What's available in my budget?
I want a mansion for cheap.
Rent should be free.

scenes.npcDialog: The bond is 4 weeks' rent. Any questions?

choices.text: When do I get it back?
Is it refundable if I leave early?
I won't pay a deposit.
That's way too much.

scenes.npcDialog: Bills are not included in the rent.

choices.text: How much are utilities usually?
What bills do I need to pay separately?
I won't pay bills.
Include everything for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to set up home internet?

choices.text: Yes, what's your cheapest plan?
How fast is your standard plan?
Internet should be free.
I'll steal my neighbor's WiFi.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: I need a cheap bed and desk.
Do you have second-hand appliances?
Everything's too expensive.
Give me stuff for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you interested in this item?

choices.text: Yes, can I see it in person first?
Is the price negotiable?
I'll take it for free.
This looks like garbage.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you registering as a new patient?

choices.text: Yes, I just moved here. What documents do I need?
Do you accept my working holiday insurance?
I don't need a doctor.
Healthcare should be free.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'd like to apply for a visa extension.
What are the requirements for extending my visa?
Just extend it automatically.
Visas are too complicated.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you filing for a tax return?

choices.text: Yes, I'm leaving the country soon.
How do I claim my tax back?
Give me all my money back.
I never paid taxes anyway.

scenes.npcDialog: So you're leaving us. When's your last day?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그럼 그만두시는 거군요. 마지막 날이 언제예요?

choices.text: In two weeks. I'll finish all my duties.
I'm giving 2 weeks' notice as required.
I'm leaving today.
I don't care about notice.

scenes.npcDialog: Need help shipping your belongings home?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 짐 본국으로 배송하는 거 도움 필요하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much for 2 boxes to Korea?
What's the cheapest shipping option?
Ship it for free.
I'll leave everything here.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need before you go?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가기 전에 더 필요한 거 있으세요?

choices.text: Could you write me a reference letter?
May I use you as a reference for future jobs?
You have to write me a good review.
I don't need references.

scenes.npcDialog: We'll miss you! When are you leaving?

choices.text: Next week. Thank you for everything!
I'll really miss you all. Let's keep in touch!
Finally, I'm out of here.
I won't miss anyone.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Are you here for a honeymoon?

choices.text: Yes! Do you have any honeymoon packages?
We just got married! What special offers do you have?
We're not really in love.
It's just a normal trip.

scenes.npcDialog: Your honeymoon suite is ready. Would you like champagne sent up?

choices.text: That would be wonderful, thank you!
Yes please! We're celebrating!
We don't drink.
Champagne is overrated.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a table by the window for a romantic dinner?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로맨틱 디너를 위해 창가 자리 드릴까요?

choices.text: Yes, that sounds perfect!
Do you have candlelit tables?
Romance is overrated.
We'll eat anywhere.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a couples massage?

choices.text: Yes! What packages do you have?
That sounds amazing. What's included?
Spas are boring.
We don't like being touched.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything special we can arrange for your partner?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 파트너를 위해 특별히 준비해드릴 것 있으세요?

choices.text: Can you put rose petals on the bed?
I'd like to surprise them with flowers in the room.
We don't do surprises.
That's too cheesy.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a special cake for the occasion?

choices.text: Yes! Can it say 'Just Married' on it?
That would be lovely. What flavors do you have?
We don't like cake.
Cakes are too sweet.

scenes.npcDialog: Room service. What can I get for you?

choices.text: A bottle of champagne and a flower bouquet, please.
Can you send up roses and strawberries?
Just bring water.
Nothing romantic please.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like access to our private beach?

choices.text: Yes! Can we reserve a cabana?
That sounds perfect for relaxing together.
We don't like beaches.
Is it free?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a professional photo session?

choices.text: Yes! We want honeymoon photos here.
That would be a wonderful memory. How much?
We don't photograph well.
Photos are pointless.

scenes.npcDialog: Interested in our romantic sunset cruise?

choices.text: That sounds magical! What time does it depart?
Is dinner included on the cruise?
Sunsets are boring.
We get seasick.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private wine tasting tour?

choices.text: Yes! Is it just the two of us?
That sounds romantic. What wines do you feature?
We don't drink wine.
Winery tours are pretentious.

scenes.npcDialog: We have couples cooking classes and dance lessons.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 커플 요리 수업과 댄스 레슨이 있어요.

choices.text: A dance lesson sounds fun! What kind of dance?
We'd love to try the cooking class together!
We're not the active type.
That's too much effort.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like engraving on this item?

choices.text: Yes! Can you put our names and wedding date?
That would be a perfect keepsake!
Engraving is too expensive.
We won't remember this trip anyway.

scenes.npcDialog: You can enjoy the massage together in the same room.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 같은 방에서 함께 마사지 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Perfect! Do you have aromatherapy options?
Wonderful! How long is the treatment?
We prefer separate rooms.
Massages are uncomfortable.

scenes.npcDialog: Your candlelit table is ready.

choices.text: It looks beautiful! Thank you!
This is so romantic. Can we order wine?
Candles are a fire hazard.
I can't read the menu in this light.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a room with an ocean view?

choices.text: Yes! That would be perfect for us.
Absolutely! Is a balcony included?
The view doesn't matter.
We'll keep the curtains closed.

scenes.npcDialog: Breakfast is served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Can we get room service instead? We want to sleep in.
Is it possible to have breakfast in bed?
That's too early.
We skip breakfast.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to decorate the room?

choices.text: Yes! Rose petals on the bed would be amazing.
Can you make a heart shape with flowers?
That's too cheesy.
We're not that romantic.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a honeymoon certificate?

choices.text: Yes! That would be a nice keepsake.
Can you include our names and dates?
Certificates are meaningless.
We don't need paper.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to hide the ring in a dessert?

choices.text: That's perfect! Please keep it a secret!
Yes! What dessert do you recommend for this?
Choking hazard, no thanks.
We're already married.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Your family room is ready. It has two queen beds.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 패밀리룸 준비됐어요. 퀸 베드 2개 있어요.

choices.text: Perfect! Is there a crib available?
Great! Where's the children's play area?
We wanted a suite.
This room is too small.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need anything else for your room?

choices.text: Yes, we need a crib for our baby.
Can you bring a baby bed and a bed rail?
The baby will sleep on the floor.
We didn't bring kids.

scenes.npcDialog: Will the little one be eating too?

choices.text: Yes, do you have any baby food options?
Can you blend something soft for the baby?
Babies don't eat.
Just give them adult food.

scenes.npcDialog: We have a special kids menu. Would you like one?

choices.text: Yes please! Does it come with a toy?
What options are there? My child is picky.
Kids menus are too small.
Just give them the adult portion.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to rent a stroller?

choices.text: Yes please! How much per day?
That would be great. Where do I return it?
Strollers are for lazy parents.
The kids can walk.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: Where's the nearest baby changing room?
Is there a diaper changing station nearby?
I'll change the diaper anywhere.
We don't use diapers.

scenes.npcDialog: How many tickets would you like?

choices.text: Two adults and one child. Is there a kids' discount?
Do children under 5 get in free?
Kids should always be free.
I won't pay for my kids.

scenes.npcDialog: We have a family pass that saves you money.

choices.text: That sounds great! How many people does it cover?
How much is the family pass?
Family passes are a scam.
We'll buy individual tickets.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the park! Your child must be this tall for some rides.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 공원에 오신 것을 환영해요! 일부 놀이기구는 키 제한이 있어요.

choices.text: Which rides are safe for toddlers?
Are there any height restrictions we should know about?
Height restrictions are stupid.
My kid can ride anything.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to leave your kids at our play center?

choices.text: How does it work? Is there supervision?
Is it safe? How long can they stay?
I'll leave them all day.
They can take care of themselves.

scenes.npcDialog: Is everything okay? You look worried.

choices.text: I can't find my child! Can you help me?
My daughter is missing! Where's the lost child center?
She'll find her way back.
Kids get lost all the time.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything wrong?

choices.text: My child has a fever. Is there a doctor nearby?
Where's the nearest pediatric clinic?
Kids get sick, it's fine.
They're just pretending.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I need children's fever medicine.
What do you have for a child's stomach ache?
Just give them adult medicine.
Medicine is unnecessary.

scenes.npcDialog: What brings you in today?

choices.text: My son has had a fever since yesterday.
She's been vomiting. Is it food poisoning?
The kid is fine.
We just wanted to visit.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: Where is the nursing room?
Is there a private area for breastfeeding?
I'll nurse anywhere.
Nursing rooms are unnecessary.

scenes.npcDialog: What kind of places are you looking for?

choices.text: What attractions are safe for young children?
Where can we go that's kid-friendly?
Kids can go anywhere.
Safety doesn't matter.

scenes.npcDialog: The playground is just ahead.

choices.text: Great! Is it suitable for a 3-year-old?
Are there any swings and slides?
Playgrounds are for babies.
My kids don't play outside.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a family photo?

choices.text: Yes please! Can you get all of us in the frame?
That would be great! Say 'cheese', kids!
We don't take photos.
Photos are a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like anything else?

choices.text: Can we get the kids' meal to go? They're tired.
Could you pack this up for later?
Just throw it away.
Kids don't need to eat.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to stop for a break?

choices.text: Yes, the kids need a bathroom break.
Let's stop here. They need to stretch their legs.
Kids don't need breaks.
We'll stop when we get there.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! What adventure are you looking for today?

choices.text: What extreme sports do you offer?
I want to try something exciting! What do you recommend?
Something easy and safe.
I'm not really adventurous.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your helmet and harness. Let me help you put it on.

choices.text: Thanks! Is it tight enough?
How do I know if it's properly secured?
Safety gear is for beginners.
I don't need a helmet.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any health conditions we should know about?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 저희가 알아야 할 건강 상태가 있나요?

choices.text: No, I'm healthy and in good shape.
I have a slight heart condition. Is it still safe?
Health doesn't matter for adventure.
I never get sick.

scenes.npcDialog: Listen carefully to the safety briefing before we start.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 시작하기 전에 안전 설명을 잘 들어주세요.

choices.text: I'm listening carefully. What's the most important thing?
Got it. Can you repeat the emergency signals?
I don't need instructions.
Let's just start already.

scenes.npcDialog: This activity requires signing a waiver. Do you have insurance?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이 활동은 서약서 서명이 필요해요. 보험 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes, I have travel insurance that covers adventure sports.
What does the waiver cover?
Insurance is a waste of money.
Nothing will happen to me.

scenes.npcDialog: Ready to jump from 15,000 feet?

choices.text: Yes! I'm so nervous but excited!
Let's do this! How long is the freefall?
This seems too dangerous.
I changed my mind.

scenes.npcDialog: Step to the edge. Jump on three!

choices.text: Here I go! One... two... three!
Oh my god, this is terrifying but amazing!
I can't do this.
This was a mistake.

scenes.npcDialog: Remember your hand signals underwater. Ready to dive?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 수중 수신호 기억하세요. 다이빙할 준비 됐나요?

choices.text: Yes! How deep are we going?
I'm ready. Will we see any sharks?
Water scares me.
I forgot everything you said.

scenes.npcDialog: Hold on tight! We're entering the rapids!

choices.text: This is amazing! What do I do if I fall out?
I'm holding on! This is so fun!
I don't want to get wet.
This is too scary.

scenes.npcDialog: Lean back and enjoy the view as you zip across!

choices.text: This is incredible! How fast am I going?
Woohoo! Can I do it again?
I'm too scared to look.
Get me down now.

scenes.npcDialog: The trail gets steeper from here. How are you feeling?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 여기서부터 길이 더 가팔라져요. 상태는 어떠세요?

choices.text: I'm good! How much further to the summit?
A bit tired but let's keep going!
I can't go any further.
Carry me.

scenes.npcDialog: Use the holds carefully. I've got you on belay.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 홀드를 조심히 사용하세요. 빌레이 잡고 있어요.

choices.text: Got it! How do I get past this overhang?
My arms are burning but I'm almost there!
This is too hard.
Just pull me up.

scenes.npcDialog: Paddle hard and pop up when you feel the wave!

choices.text: Like this? How's my stance?
I did it! I'm actually surfing!
I keep falling off.
Surfing is impossible.

scenes.npcDialog: Run off the cliff and we'll glide together!

choices.text: This is the most amazing view I've ever seen!
I can't believe I'm flying! How do we steer?
I can't jump off a cliff.
This is too high.

scenes.npcDialog: Paddle on alternate sides to go straight.

choices.text: Got it! This is so peaceful.
How do I turn around?
I'm going in circles.
This is boring.

scenes.npcDialog: Stay close and watch your head. The ceiling gets low here.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가까이 붙고 머리 조심하세요. 천장이 낮아져요.

choices.text: This is incredible! How old is this cave?
I'll be careful. Are there any underground rivers?
I'm claustrophobic.
It's too dark in here.

scenes.npcDialog: Keep quiet and don't make sudden movements.

choices.text: I understand. What animals might we see?
This is so exciting! Can I take photos?
I want to touch the animals.
Animals don't scare me.

scenes.npcDialog: Need help setting up your tent?

choices.text: Yes please! I've never camped before.
Which side faces into the wind?
Camping is uncomfortable.
I'd rather stay in a hotel.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you okay? What happened?

choices.text: I twisted my ankle. Do you have a first aid kit?
I got stung by something. It's swelling.
I'm fine, leave me alone.
Injuries heal themselves.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need emergency assistance?

choices.text: Yes! My friend is injured and can't walk.
Please call for help! We're stuck on the cliff.
We can handle it ourselves.
It's not that serious.
